policy.note: Do not disable reasoning for quality evals. Use model-specific caps and request-shape adapters.

moonshotai/kimi-k2.6.label: Kimi
moonshotai/kimi-k2.6.rationale: Kimi K2.6 docs show native thinking and a 32K-token example; docs also state fixed temperature/top_p for K2.6/K2.5.

z-ai/glm-5.2.label: GLM
z-ai/glm-5.2.rationale: Z.ai docs list GLM-5.2 default max_tokens 65536 and max 131072; default reasoning_effort is max.

deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro.label: DeepSeek
deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro.rationale: DeepSeek reasoning docs say max_tokens includes CoT and final answer; default is 32K and max is 64K.

minimax/minimax-m3.label: Minimax
minimax/minimax-m3.rationale: MiniMax M3 supports thinking enabled/adaptive/disabled. It answered cleanly in the mixed run, so 8192 is the first serious cap.

xiaomi/mimo-v2.5-pro.label: MiMo
xiaomi/mimo-v2.5-pro.rationale: MiMo V2.5 Pro is a 1M-context agentic model; prior 4096 cleanup still suggested reasoning-heavy behavior.

nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-ultra-550b-a55b.label: Nemotron
nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-ultra-550b-a55b.rationale: Nemotron answered cleanly in the mixed run; no special request controls found yet.

google/gemma-4-31b-it.label: Gemma
google/gemma-4-31b-it.rationale: Gemma answered cleanly; DeepInfra was fastest among reliable provider probes.
